positive: Minimalist nature scene, showing a stylized grouping of three hummingbirds feeding from stylized watercolor-painted jungle flowers. The birds and flowers should be rendered with clean, crisp silhouettes, set against a solid, bright pastel teal background. The style must mimic sophisticated line art mixed with modern botanical illustration, optimized for screen printing. Use high contrast negative space. Composition is central and symmetrical. Perfect for apparel print, vector art aesthetic, graphic design, no gradient wash.
